scripts.setup:
#!/bin/zsh
set -euo pipefail

echo '🔧 Adaptive Lighting workspace setup'

# ── Python toolchain ──
if ! command -v uv &>/dev/null; then
  echo '📦 Installing uv (fast Python package manager)...'
  curl -LsSf https://astral.sh/uv/install.sh | sh
  export PATH="$HOME/.local/bin:$PATH"
fi

# ── Python 3.12+ via uv ──
echo '🐍 Ensuring Python 3.12...'
uv python install 3.12 2>/dev/null || true

# ── Virtual env + dependencies ──
echo '📦 Creating venv and installing deps...'
uv venv --python 3.12 .venv
source .venv/bin/activate
uv pip install -e '.[dev]' 2>/dev/null || uv pip install -e .

# ── Dev tools ──
uv pip install ruff mypy pre-commit pytest pytest-asyncio pytest-homeassistant-custom-component 2>/dev/null || true

# ── HA Core clone (needed for tests) ──
if [ ! -d core ]; then
  echo '🏠 Cloning HA Core (shallow, for test fixtures)...'
  git clone --depth 1 --branch dev https://github.com/home-assistant/core.git core
  ./scripts/setup-symlinks 2>/dev/null || true
fi

# ── Pre-commit hooks ──
if [ -f .pre-commit-config.yaml ]; then
  echo '🪝 Installing pre-commit hooks...'
  pre-commit install 2>/dev/null || true
fi

# ── GitHub CLI auth check ──
if command -v gh &>/dev/null; then
  if ! gh auth status &>/dev/null; then
    echo '⚠️  gh CLI not authenticated — run: gh auth login'
  fi
fi

# ── Fork remote ──
if ! git remote get-url fork &>/dev/null; then
  echo '🍴 Adding fork remote...'
  git remote add fork https://github.com/florianhorner/adaptive-lighting.git
fi
git fetch fork --quiet 2>/dev/null || true

# ── Stay current with upstream ──
echo '🔄 Fetching upstream main...'
git fetch origin main --quiet 2>/dev/null || true

# ── HA token symlink ──
if [ -f ~/.ha-token ] && [ ! -f .ha-token ]; then
  ln -s ~/.ha-token .ha-token
  echo '🔑 Symlinked .ha-token'
fi

echo '✅ Setup complete. Python $(python --version), uv $(uv --version)'
scripts.run:
#!/bin/zsh
source .venv/bin/activate 2>/dev/null
echo '🧪 Running test suite...'
python -m pytest tests/ -x -q --tb=short 2>&1 | tail -20
echo ''
echo '🔍 Lint check...'
ruff check custom_components/adaptive_lighting/ --quiet
echo '✅ All checks passed'
scripts.archive:
#!/bin/zsh
# Mine session context into MemPalace
if command -v mine-context &>/dev/null; then
  echo '🧠 Mining session into MemPalace...'
  mine-context . 2>/dev/null || true
fi
# Clean up HA Core clone (large)
if [ -d core ]; then
  echo '🧹 Removing HA Core clone...'
  rm -rf core
fi
# Clean up venv
if [ -d .venv ]; then
  rm -rf .venv
fi
